creator: sutton@aardvark.apana.org.au
text:
Max,

> The patch you submitted seems to be missing a new file called
> patch-ba.  Please check and send it in if necessary.

Oops. That'll teach me to submit a problem report when I've got the 
flu (:->). I've attached it to this message. Thanks for taking the 
time to give me a buzz. 

Best regards, Joel...
